criteria.reason: security_production_role_edit_lifecycle added with plan/apply/verify/rollback; plan snapshots the production role by role_name/role_index and stores the full original record.
apply pushes modified_roles changing only comment; live verify confirms the codex-* comment present on the operator role.
rollback restores the exact captured record; live rollback reports full_restore=true and the role matches the original byte-for-byte.
Same gating as 5F-B1: AXXON_ADMIN_MUTATION_APPROVE=1 + CONFIRM tokens; apply rejected without env/token (existing tests cover rejection).
Unit tests cover edit/restore and unknown-role gap; full suite 505 OK. Live smoke PASS=6 WARN=0 FAIL=0 with the production role workflow.
